body.title: Re-ship the ollama honest-liveness ping — the fix was clobbered before commit
body.description:
**What happened:** T-inference-ollama-honest-liveness (closed at 1c622e05) shipped its TESTS but NOT its fix. During the non-vacuity proof I neutered OllamaSource.ping, ran the tests, then reverted the neuter with `git checkout -- sources.py` — but the /api/tags ping edit was still UNCOMMITTED, so the checkout reverted it to HEAD's socket-based ping. I then `git add`ed + committed the (reverted) sources.py alongside the tests and closed the ticket WITHOUT a final full-suite run, so the 5 branch-specific liveness tests were red on HEAD and the honest-liveness behavior never actually shipped. The rung-1 smoke + rung-2 DS runs 'passed' only because Hex's socket was open (socket ping happened to agree). **Fix:** re-applied the /api/tags HTTP probe to OllamaSource.ping (200+non-empty→available; 404/URLError/empty→unavailable; fail-soft). Verified: 6 liveness tests green, full inference suite back to only the 3 pre-existing mini-rack fails, and live against real Hex (True on 10.0.0.100, False+no-raise on a dead port). **Root-cause lever:** never `git checkout -- <file>` to undo a neuter when the real change to that file is still uncommitted — it destroys the working change. Commit the change first, THEN neuter/restore; or stash-scope the neuter. **Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/sources.py.

**Design rules:** honest liveness; fail-soft. **Scope boundary:** IN — re-apply the ping fix. OUT — the ladder registration (its own ticket). **Test plan:** the existing tests/inference/test_ollama_liveness.py (6) now pass on HEAD (were red); live Hex probe confirms True/False.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Re-applied the /api/tags honest-liveness ping to OllamaSource (was clobbered by a git-checkout-over-uncommitted-change before 1c622e05). 6 liveness tests now green on HEAD (were red), full inference suite back to only the 3 pre-existing mini-rack fails, live-verified against real Hex (True on 10.0.0.100:11434, False+fail-soft on a dead port).
body.unproven_reason: The 6 liveness tests ARE the proof (a socket-only or hollow ping fails 5/6, proven earlier by neutering) but they're additive/branch tests the proof_emitter can't diff-invert (T-proof-emitter-additive-surface-mode). Now genuinely on HEAD + live-confirmed, unlike the clobbered first attempt.
